<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the current segmentation for the purple square
seg = current_frame.segmentation
purple_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p']
print(f"Purple nodes: {len(purple_nodes)}")
for n in purple_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}, at ({min_r},{min_c}), boundary={b}")

# Check dark gray nodes (toggled cells)
gray_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
print(f"\nDark gray nodes: {len(gray_nodes)}")
for n in gray_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, at ({min_r},{min_c})")

# Check all nodes
print(f"\nAll nodes: {len(seg['nodes'])}")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, at ({min_r},{min_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
